name: FT Campbell tennis courts
description: FT Campbell tennis courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fort Campbell, KY. There are 6 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Montgomery County Parks and Recreation
description: Four new outdoor courts. No amenities. No resting area. No water.
open_play_schedule: No schedule. First come, first serve.
